content: TASK-010 release/demo checkpoint done: incorporated @archmap/icons v0.1.2. package.json/package-lock now use @archmap/icons ^0.1.2, README/SYNTAX/DELIVERY/static demo CDN import-map examples pin @archmap/icons@0.1.2/+esm, and local Vite was restarted so dependency optimization picks up the new lockfile. Public package API remains compatible (`installCloudProviderIcons`, `installFamousServiceIcons`); cloud icon counts verified as AWS 305 / GCP 261 / Azure 705. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/icons.test.ts test/samples.test.ts, npm run build, jsDelivr HEAD for @archmap/icons@0.1.2/+esm returned HTTP 200 with x-jsd-version 0.1.2, browser smoke on 127.0.0.1:5173 showed release-checkout sample, 12 samples, SVG icons present, no diagnostics, and no console errors. Dev server remains running on 127.0.0.1:5173. Remaining release work: final file demo/GitHub Pages smoke, npm publish 0.1.1 by human, create/push v0.1.1 tag, verify @archmap/core CDN/jsDelivr URLs.
